win_condition: Highest Doom with all 6 Spellbooks when game ends (30+ Doom or Instant Death triggered)

categories.label: Doom from Controlled Gates
categories.description: Each Doom Phase, advance Doom 1 per Controlled Gate

categories.label: Ritual of Annihilation Doom
categories.description: Spend Power to perform Ritual — gain additional Doom equal to Controlled Gates

categories.label: Elder Sign Trophies
categories.description: Hidden tokens worth 1, 2, or 3 Doom each — earned via Rituals (1 per Great Old One in play) and certain abilities

categories.label: Spellbooks Earned
categories.description: Must have all 6 Spellbooks on Faction Card to be eligible to win
